steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The lab includes engineers, biologists, chemists, and physicists, with research using insights and techniques from all those fields.

steps.title: Match the word to the signal
steps.content:
This shows the work goes beyond traditional discipline boundaries. “Transcending” means surpassing limits—exactly what this describes.

The other choices either suggest the work exemplifies or reinforces those boundaries (A and D), or are unrelated to crossing them (C).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
